title: Custom WordPress Template for Tutorial Post Type
story: As a DataTools Pro website visitor, I want tutorials to display in a clean layout with a navigation sidebar and without blog metadata clutter, so that I can focus on learning the content.
description:
## Context
A custom post type called "Tutorial" was created in WordPress for datatoolspro.com. The default blog template showed metadata (title, author, date, featured image, previous/next links, tags) that was not desired for tutorials.

## Requirements
- Use a traditional blog-style layout with a narrow sidebar for a post list widget on the left and single post content on the right.
- Hide: Title, Author + date, Featured image, Previous/Next navigation, Tags.
- Only apply these changes to the Tutorial custom post type; regular blog posts remain unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Tutorial custom post type uses a dedicated template
Sidebar displays a post list widget
Title, author, date, featured image are hidden on tutorial pages
Previous/Next navigation and tags are removed from tutorial pages
Regular blog posts are unaffected by these changes
ux_changes: Custom tutorial template with sidebar navigation and hidden metadata elements (title, author, date, featured image, nav links, tags).
middleware_changes: New WordPress template file for the Tutorial custom post type with conditional display logic.
implementation_notes: WordPress custom post type template overrides. Metadata elements hidden only for the Tutorial post type.
comment_summary: Developer removed the specified sections from the tutorial detail page and confirmed other post types work normally.
